## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content performance, website migration, and strategy updates.](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance hit all-time highs in views and sessions, with exceptionally high engagement rates (80-90%)](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Galileo's website migration may temporarily impact SEO rankings; QA and fixes are ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Podcast blog strategy shifting to focus on incorporating content into existing blogs and enriching SEO](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Plans to integrate top-performing video content into relevant blog posts in early June](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [All-time highs in views and sessions](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [GSC data showing positive trends, aligning with other platform metrics](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic reached new high of 226 sessions](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Exceptionally high content engagement: 900 sessions on Google with 82% engaged](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [New top 5 keyword rankings: character error rate, birth score, agentic AI](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [LLM traffic not necessarily leading to more conversions; potentially more brand awareness-focused](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

### Website Migration Concerns

  - [Conor expressed worry about potential SEO impact due to Sanity instance setup](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Manual QA process underway to identify and fix issues](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Drop-dead date for website migration: Monday](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [1-2 weeks expected for post-migration adjustments and fixes](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Focus on accurate metadata, SEO titles, and redirect management](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Recreating and updating images for various content pieces (e.g., mastering agency, leaderboard)](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Discontinuing separate podcast blog posts due to low traffic and timing issues](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Shifting focus to incorporating podcast quotes and video content into existing blogs](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Plans to enrich content and align it more closely with the sales funnel in early June](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### Video Content Integration

  - [Proposal to embed top-performing podcast and how-to videos in relevant blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [GrowthX has scraped all YouTube videos to facilitate automatic insertion in relevant blogs](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Consideration of webinar content for potential integration](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to have 8 articles ready for the week](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Complete technical pre-audit of Galileo's website](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Finalize new topics on MRM and model validation for financial services cluster by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Conor to provide GrowthX team access to new website by Monday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [GrowthX to prioritize reviews content once migration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Prepare for content enrichment and funnel alignment work with new campaign team member in early June](https://fathom.video/share/6s4pDgM_weQEBBKt2nU7Ro5EmY9RoQoR?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
